Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify Cases Use order_id as the case identifier Derive Activities Order Created from Orders table Item Picked from Order Lines table Order Dispatched and Order Arrived from Delivery table Invoice Issued from Invoice table Payment Received from Payments table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Map Timestamps Order Created order_date Item Picked item_picking_date Order Dispatched delivery_dispatch_date Order Arrived delivery_arrival_date Invoice Issued invoice_issue_date Payment Received payment_date Combine Data Link events using order_id

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Since each line item has a different picker and timestamp making it one event per line item is meaningful Ill name it Item Picked

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Enrich with Resources and Attributes Order Created sales_person_id as Resource Item Picked picker_id as Resource Order Dispatched Arrived carrier_id as Resource Invoice Issued billing_person_id as Resource Payment Received No direct resource in the table

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait order 1002 has 2 deliveries Chronological order 2024 01 04T07 20 00Z Order Dispatched 2024 01 05T07 00 00Z Order Dispatched 2024 01 07T16 10 00Z Order Arrived 2024 01 08T10 00 00Z Order Arrived 2024 01 08T10 15 00Z Invoice Issued

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activity Names Order Created Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Attributes to include For Order Created customer_id customer_type order_priority For Item Picked item_id quantity For Order Dispatched carrier_id delivery_note For Order Arrived carrier_id delivery_note For Invoice Issued invoice_amount For Payment Received payment_method payment_reference

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets map the resources using the Resources table SP 001 Alice Brown SP 002 Bob Smith SP 003 Charlie Kim WH 001 David Lin WH 002 Eva Johnson WH 003 Frank Miller CR 01 GlobalTransport CR 02 FastShip CR 03 AirExpress BL 001 Gina Carter BL 002 Harry Lee BL 003 Irene Park

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check the chronological order for Order 1002 This is perfectly chronological

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check Order 1001 Chronological Lets double check Order 1003 Chronological Lets double check Order 1004 Chronological Lets double check Order 1005 Chronological

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Assumptions to document Order 1004 has no associated delivery invoice or payment data in the provided tables so its process instance ends after item picking For Payment Received events there is no direct resource actor specified in the Payments table so the Resource column is left empty

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Wait having so many columns might make the markdown table very wide and hard to read I can combine some attributes into an Attributes column Actually standard process mining logs usually have a fixed set of columns I will provide them as separate columns for clarity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Looks solid I will present the assumptions clearly before the table I will format the table with Markdown I will use the full names for resources as per the Resources table I will leave cells empty if data is not applicable for that activity
